description: A club sandwich is a stacked sandwich traditionally made with toasted bread, cooked poultry, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise. It is often cut into quarters and secured with picks.
preparation_steps: Cook or prepare the poultry and bacon.
Layer the bread with mayonnaise, meat, bacon, lettuce, and tomato.
Stack into multiple layers, cut into quarters, and secure with picks.

health_advice.benefits: Provides substantial protein and can be filling enough for a meal.
health_advice.risks: Can be high in sodium and fat because of bacon, mayonnaise, and processed bread.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use lean poultry, less mayonnaise, and add extra salad vegetables.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional versions are non-vegetarian. Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free versions are possible with substitutions.

allergens: Possible milk if cheese is added

serving_info.typical_serving: 1 sandwich, often cut into 2 or 4 pieces
